nasb.text: and the prescribed portion of oil (namely, the bath of oil), a tenth of a bath from each kor (which is ten baths or a homer, for ten baths are a homer);

esv.text: and as the fixed portion of oil, measured in baths, one tenth of a bath from each cor (the cor, like the homer, contains ten baths).

cnv.text: 獻油的規定是這樣：要用‘罷特’來量，一‘柯珥’要獻一‘罷特’的十分之一。原來一‘柯珥’等於十‘罷特’或是一‘賀梅珥’，因為十‘罷特’就是一‘賀梅珥’。

ccb.text: 每一柯珥的油要献十分之一罢特，一柯珥等于十罢特或一贺梅珥，因为一贺梅珥等于十罢特。
